articles.title: Recent Advances in RH Approximations
key_novelties: Formulated a discrete analogue of the Riemann Zeta function.
formalizable_elements: The Mellin transform mapping requires advanced complex analysis library support in Mathlib.
articles.intuitions: They realized that instead of fighting precision drift in floating point math, they could bound the problem entirely using exact rational arithmetic.

articles.title: Phase 1 Diagnostics for H15 Kernel
